About Jaideep Enterprises

Tier-1 partner for
precision brass components.

We combine Jamnagar's brass heritage with Bangalore-based program management. Every batch ships with dimensional reports, surface-finish confirmation, and export-ready packing.

Global clients across electrical, electronics, auto ancillaries, plumbing, and automotive industries. Custom components from your drawings or samples — prototype to production.

Product Categories

Precision Brass Inserts & Fasteners.

Metric brass inserts, studs, and heat-set press-fit inserts — machined to tolerance for reliable, long-life plastic assemblies.

01
M2 Brass Inserts

Precision M2 threaded brass inserts for plastic moulding. Knurled exterior for maximum pull-out strength in tight tolerances.

Enquire →
02
M3 Brass Inserts

M3 brass threaded inserts for injection-moulded components. Heat-set and press-fit compatible with standard tooling.

Enquire →
03
M4 Brass Inserts

M4 brass inserts for medium-load applications in plastic housings. Uniform thread profile ensures consistent assembly torque.

Enquire →
04
M5 Brass Inserts

M5 brass moulding inserts with knurled body for superior grip. Suited for high-cycle assembly in electrical and industrial enclosures.

Enquire →
05
M6 Brass Inserts

M6 brass threaded inserts for robust fastening in moulded plastic panels. Available in standard and flanged configurations.

Enquire →
06
M8 Brass Inserts

Heavy-duty M8 brass inserts for structural plastic assemblies. High torque resistance with precision-machined thread form.

Enquire →
07
Brass Studs

Precision brass studs for press-fit and moulded-in applications. Custom lengths and thread specifications available to drawing.

Enquire →
08
Heat Insertion / Press Fit Inserts

Ultrasonic and heat-set brass inserts for thermoplastic components. Optimal knurl pattern for pull-out and torque resistance.

Enquire →
Why Choose Us

Precision, documentation,
and responsiveness.

We engineer for repeatability: CMM checks, gauge-calibrated lines, and export packing tuned to each market. Our 85%+ repeat client rate speaks for itself.

Prototype to pilot in days, not weeks. 48-hour RFQ response guaranteed.
Export packing & documentation

Competitive pricing

Made to your drawing or sample
Share a sketch, sample, or PDF — full CAD/CAM support for reverse engineering.
